features.name: logic variable assigned from signal at declaration
features.description: Code should include a logic variable assigned at declaration with a signal expression (struct field access), which triggers incorrect continuous assignment classification in Verilator

features.name: verilator public annotation affects assignment semantics
features.description: Code should include a logic variable assignment at declaration with a verilator public annotation that changes the assignment from incorrect continuous to correct initial behavior

features.name: struct member field access in assignment
features.description: Code should include a struct member field accessed on an input port used in a declaration assignment, which exposes the misclassification bug
features.snippet:
struct packed { logic [7:0] field0; } bar_in;
logic temp0 = bar_in.field0;
